code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if n % 2 == 0
        if string.is_empty(evens)
          evens = "#{n}"
        else
          evens = "#{evens} #{n}"
        end
      else
        if string.is_empty(odds)
          odds = "#{n}"
        else
          odds = "#{odds} #{n}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
